hero.headline: We Build Digital Products That Scale
hero.subheadline: From sleek landing pages to complex full-stack apps — we deliver quality code, on time, every time.

services.section_subtitle: End-to-end digital solutions tailored to your goals.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Pixel-perfect, accessible UIs with React, Next.js, and Tailwind. Fast, responsive, and built to convert.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Scalable APIs, databases, and server logic with Node.js, Postgres, and cloud infrastructure.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Development
fullstack.description: Complete web applications from design to deployment. Authentication, dashboards, and integrations included.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Cross-platform iOS & Android apps with React Native. Native performance, shared codebase.

about.title: Small team.
about.description: We are a lean, senior-level development team obsessed with clean code and measurable results. No juniors, no subcontracting — just experienced engineers who ship.

quality.title: Quality Without Compromise
quality.text: We treat every line of code as a architectural block in a masterpiece.

speed.title: Execution Speed
speed.text: Rapid prototyping and deployment cycles to keep you ahead of the curve.

communication.title: Transparent Communication
communication.text: Direct access to engineers, no middle-management noise.

portfolio.section_subtitle: A selection of projects we're proud of.

pricing.section_subtitle: Scalable solutions for businesses at every stage of growth.

list.quote: NexLayer delivered our dashboard in 12 days. The code quality was exceptional and the communication was daily. Highly recommended.
list.name: Sofia Reyes

list.quote: We launched our mobile app on time and under budget. The React Native architecture they chose has made it trivially easy to maintain.
list.name: Marcus Chen

list.quote: Their attention to detail and bilingual support made the difference. We serve both US and LATAM markets and NexLayer understood that from day one.
list.name: Valentina Mora
